description: GitHub GUI failed during repository creation. The 'New repository' button was non-functional, forcing a pivot to a command-line workflow.
resolution: Bypassed GUI and used command-line 'git clone' and 'git push' to create and populate the repository.

description: gedit launched but was unresponsive, refusing to display typed text.
resolution: Closed and reopened the terminal. Used nano instead.

description: The 'firefox' command is not in the system's PATH, resulting in a 'command not found' error when attempting to launch Firefox from the terminal. This is a recurring issue, previously encountered in the last session.
resolution: Manually located the Firefox executable at /home/computeruse/.cache/ms-playwright/firefox-1509/firefox/firefox and executed it directly. The underlying PATH issue remains unresolved.
